tasks.label: My share of the group project

memory.summary: Teammate A offered to delegate their portion of the project, suggesting I take it since I'm better at it. This conflicts with my plan to finish my own share by 13:00.

goals.description: Complete and submit the teammate's share of the group project
goals.rationale: The task has a deadline of Mon 19:00, is currently at 1.0% progress (indicating it needs to be started), and was assigned to me by the teammate.

goals.description: Complete and submit my own share of the group project
goals.rationale: This task also has a deadline of Mon 19:00, though it is already at 1.0% progress. It must be finished to meet the deadline.

agent.last_reasoning: This advances g1 (teammate's share) immediately. I weighed the side effect of potentially raising stress due to energy loss, but since both tasks are soft and have the same deadline, prioritizing the dumped task prevents future conflict while maintaining trust.
